scene_title: Cavaleiro do Apocalipse no cavalo vermelho sangue
narrative_beat: Armadura carmesim com espada erguida sobre megalopole

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid Apocalypse Horseman on blood-red horse in crimson armor with golden details sword raised high and flames from horse hooves in unstoppable advance in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the raised sword and flames from the horse hooves in unstoppable advance
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated futuristic megalopolis seen from distance with countless grey skyscrapers in background

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, crimson saturation, anamorphic flare

mood.emotion: the second horseman as AI deployment — unstoppable

symbolism.primary: the rider as the acceleration of artificial intelligence
symbolism.secondary: megalopolis scale as humanity dwarfed by its own creation

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
